response.overview: After surviving a deadly alien encounter during a NASA mission, Malinda Nicholson is pulled into a galaxy-wide war far beyond Earth. Hunted across space and forced to survive aboard enemy warships, she becomes the legendary warrior known as Space Hunter — a feared protector armed with cosmic power, a glowing blade, and a past she can never escape.
response.tagline: THE FIRST AND GREATEST SC-FI FILM EVER MADE BY VANTAGE STUDIOS
response.title: Space Hunter
